film.title: End of Watch
film.overview: Two young officers are marked for death after confiscating a small cache of money and firearms from the members of a notorious cartel during a routine traffic stop.

dialogues.dialogue: F**k! We f*****g lit 'em up, dawg!  Show those putos whose neighborhood this f****r is! S**t.  F*****g proud of you, man.  And that's what I'm f*****g telling you. Good.  That was f*****g good, man. That's what I'm f*****g telling you.
